name: Personalização por Perfil - Academia Full Force

parameters.query:
SELECT 
  m.*,
  -- Histórico de atividades
  COALESCE(at.modalidade_preferida, 'musculação') as modalidade_preferida,
  COALESCE(at.horario_preferido, 'manhã') as horario_preferido,
  COALESCE(at.frequencia_semanal, 3) as frequencia_semanal,
  
  -- Dados demográficos
  CASE 
    WHEN m.idade BETWEEN 18 AND 25 THEN 'jovem'
    WHEN m.idade BETWEEN 26 AND 35 THEN 'adulto_jovem'
    WHEN m.idade BETWEEN 36 AND 50 THEN 'adulto'
    ELSE 'senior'
  END as faixa_etaria,
  
  -- Comportamento de engajamento
  COALESCE(eng.score_engajamento, 50) as score_engajamento,
  COALESCE(eng.responde_whatsapp, true) as responde_whatsapp,
  COALESCE(eng.prefere_promocao, false) as prefere_promocao,
  
  -- Dados financeiros
  COALESCE(fin.inadimplente, false) as inadimplente,
  COALESCE(fin.plano_premium, false) as plano_premium
  
FROM academia_members m
LEFT JOIN member_activities at ON m.id = at.member_id
LEFT JOIN member_engagement eng ON m.id = eng.member_id  
LEFT JOIN member_financial fin ON m.id = fin.member_id
WHERE m.whatsapp_formatado = '{{ $json.whatsapp_number }}'

INSERT INTO message_schedule (
  student_id,
  whatsapp_number,
  message_content,
  scheduled_time,
  persona_type,
  campaign_type,
  priority,
  created_at
) VALUES (
  {{ $json.id }},
  '{{ $json.whatsapp_formatado }}',
  '{{ $json.personalizedMessage }}',
  CURRENT_DATE + TIME '{{ $json.bestTimeToSend }}',
  '{{ $json.persona.persona }}',
  '{{ $json.campaignType }}',
  CASE 
    WHEN '{{ $json.persona.urgencia }}' = 'alta' THEN 1
    WHEN '{{ $json.persona.urgencia }}' = 'média' THEN 2
    ELSE 3
  END,
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
)

INSERT INTO personalization_logs (
  student_id,
  persona_detected,
  tone_used,
  focus_area,
  urgency_level,
  engagement_score,
  message_sent,
  delivery_method,
  created_at
) VALUES (
  {{ $json.id }},
  '{{ $json.persona.persona }}',
  '{{ $json.persona.tom }}',
  '{{ $json.persona.foco }}',
  '{{ $json.persona.urgencia }}',
  {{ $json.score_engajamento }},
  '{{ $json.personalizedMessage }}',
  CASE WHEN '{{ $json.bestTimeToSend }}' = 'immediate' THEN 'immediate' ELSE 'scheduled' END,
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
)
